description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after a red panda, featuring a rounded body and a large, bushy tail with distinct orange and brown stripes. The toy's face is detailed with white markings around the eyes, nose, and mouth, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. Its ears are pointed and lined with white, and the eyes are dark and expressive. Around its neck, the toy wears a decorative accessory made of two autumn-colored leaves, one red and one green, adding a playful touch. The surface texture is visibly soft and slightly textured, resembling fabric with a gentle, matte finish. The overall color palette is warm, dominated by shades of orange, brown, and white.
description: A plush red panda stuffed toy with a bushy striped tail, white facial markings, and a decorative leaf accessory around its neck. The surface is soft and textured, with warm orange and brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red panda's face, white markings, pointed ears, and the leaf accessory around its neck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded body, bushy striped tail, and the profile of the face and leaf accessory.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and the full length of the striped tail, with the leaf accessory partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing both the tail and the leaf accessory, as well as the side of the face and body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with wide, dark eyes and a small, closed mouth. The white markings around the eyes and muzzle enhance its approachable and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its front legs close to the body and the tail curled around the side. The head is slightly tilted forward, giving a relaxed and attentive posture.
